requirements_addressed: AC-001: prompt_text contains pattern block for known template projects
AC-002: Regression-free for projects without manifest
AC-003: Logging of selected files and token estimates
AC-005: All modified files compile cleanly

completion_promises.criterion_text: AutoBuildContextResult.prompt_text contains the pattern block when the project is initialised from a known template.
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented _append_template_patterns() method in AutoBuildContextLoader that loads manifest, runs load_template_patterns + select_patterns, formats via format_pattern_block, and appends the result to prompt_text. Called from both the Graphiti-enabled and graceful-degradation paths in get_player_context(). Tests test_player_context_contains_pattern_block and test_wiring_logs_selected_files verify this behaviour.

completion_promises.criterion_text: For projects with no .claude/manifest.json, prompt_text is identical to pre-change behaviour (regression-free — verified by existing AutoBuild tests).
completion_promises.evidence: _append_template_patterns() checks manifest_path.exists() and returns early if absent — no changes to prompt_text. Test test_player_context_no_manifest_unchanged verifies 'Stack Pattern Reference' is NOT in prompt_text when no manifest exists. All 64 existing tests pass unchanged.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Log output (captured in tests) lists selected file names and token estimate.
completion_promises.evidence: _append_template_patterns() emits logger.info with '[TemplatePattern] Appended pattern block: N files, ~N tokens (file1, file2)'. logger.warning for pattern loading warnings. logger.debug for skip reasons. Test test_wiring_logs_selected_files captures log output and verifies pattern/manifest/template is mentioned.

completion_promises.criterion_text: The wiring does not alter the signature of get_player_context(); all existing callers remain compatible.
completion_promises.evidence: get_player_context() signature is completely unchanged — the pattern loading is done inside the method body via _append_template_patterns(result, tech_stack=tech_stack) calls. Test test_wiring_does_not_alter_get_player_context_signature uses inspect.signature to verify all original parameters are present.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors.
completion_promises.evidence: Both modified files (autobuild_context_loader.py and test_template_pattern_loader.py) pass python -m py_compile with zero errors. Code follows PEP 8, uses type hints, proper docstrings, and consistent style with the existing codebase.
